_comment: Plugin MCP wiring. Google-family + Meta connectors are pre-wired via Composio's hosted MCPs (free Composio account required at composio.dev; each marketer authorizes the platform on first use). Google Drive is NOT pre-wired here — it lives in Claude desktop's native Connectors catalog (Customize → Connectors → Google Drive). The /setup-marketing skill walks through both groups in order.

google-ads._comment: Google Ads via Composio. WRITE-CAPABLE: GAQL reads + Mutate Campaigns/budgets/bids/negatives/create ads. Per-user OAuth on first use. No Google Ads developer-token application needed (Composio provisions). Alternative: Pipeboard (also hosted, also token-free) — swap if Composio is missing a specific action.

meta-ads._comment: Meta Ads via Composio. WRITE-CAPABLE: create/update/pause campaigns, budgets, ads/creatives. Facebook + Instagram. Per-user OAuth on first use.

google-analytics._comment: GA4 sessions, conversions, funnel data. Read-only. Per-user OAuth.

google-search-console._comment: Organic clicks/impressions/positions per query and page. Read-only. Per-user OAuth.

google-tag-manager._comment: WRITE-CAPABLE: read containers/tags/triggers, create/edit, publish versions. Conversion-tracking changes count as Tier 1 in the spend-gate. Per-user OAuth.

google-merchant-center._comment: WRITE-CAPABLE: feed health, product attributes, supplemental feeds, promotions. Only relevant for brands running Shopping/PMax with a product feed (ecom/marketplace). Tier 2 for most edits; Tier 1 when enabling new spending campaigns from feed changes. Per-user OAuth. NOTE: URL is the Composio pattern — verify against your Composio account before rollout; if missing, the closest alternative is the official Google Content API.

ahrefs._comment: SEO keyword research, backlinks, site audits, Brand Radar (AI mentions/GEO). Vendor-native MCP — not on Composio. Org API key.

similarweb._comment: Competitive traffic, market benchmarking. Vendor-native MCP. Org API key.

notion._comment: Optional. Briefs, playbooks in Notion. Vendor-native MCP.

supabase._comment: Already in use. Portfolio-site product/usage data. Vendor-native MCP.

vercel._comment: Already in use. Inspect deployments / scheduled data-pull jobs. Vendor-native MCP.

slack._comment: Optional. Share finished reports as messages. Vendor-native MCP.
